connectionTimeout.title: Connection Timeout
connectionTimeout.description: We couldn't reach the Musclog servers. Please check your internet connection.

errors.aiCreditsError: AI service quota exceeded. Please check your API key or try again later.
errors.aiProcessingError: Sorry, I had trouble processing that request. Please try again in a moment.
errors.gatewayDailyLimitError: Daily free AI limit reached. Try again tomorrow or add your own API key in AI Settings.

databaseError.title: Database Error
databaseError.description: A database error occurred. Error reporting has been enabled to help resolve this issue.
